author: 0x64746b
text: Equality check on documents behaves unexpectedly

author: 0x64746b
text:
```
In [1]: from elasticsearch_dsl import DocType, String

In [2]: class Author(DocType):
    name = String()
   ...:     

In [3]: a = Author(name='George Orwell')

In [4]: b = Author(name='George Orwell')

In [5]: a == b
Out[5]: True

In [6]: a != b
Out[6]: True
```

Am I holding it wrong?  
dtk

author: honzakral
text: No, you are not - it's just that we have defined `__eq__` but not `__ne__`, my bad.
